sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22464" key="glwxinwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωχῑνωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n22464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barbed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βέλη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.88</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
